name: Claude Code
description: An agentic coding tool from Anthropic that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster through natural language commands.

name: Codex CLI
description: A lightweight coding agent that runs in your terminal. Codex can read and modify local files, execute commands, and iterate — turning natural language into working code.

name: Gemini CLI
description: An open-source AI agent for the command line, built on the Gemini model, that helps developers with coding tasks directly from the terminal.

name: Aider
description: AI pair programming in your terminal. Aider lets you pair program with LLMs to edit code in your local git repo, supporting multi-file edits and automatic git commits.

name: Cline
description: An autonomous coding agent for VS Code that can create and edit files, execute commands, use the browser, and more — with your permission at every step.

name: OpenClaw
description: Personal AI assistant platform — run your own AI on any device, any channel

name: Cursor
description: The AI-first IDE. Built to make you extraordinarily productive, Cursor is the best way to code with AI.

name: GitHub Copilot
description: Your AI pair programmer. GitHub Copilot uses OpenAI Codex to suggest code and entire functions in real-time.

name: Continue
description: Open-source autopilot for VS Code and JetBrains — the easiest way to code with any LLM.

name: Windsurf
description: The first agentic IDE, where AI flows with your development. Windsurf understands your codebase and collaborates with you in real-time.

name: Bolt.new
description: Prompt, run, edit, and deploy full-stack web apps in the browser. Built by StackBlitz.

name: v0
description: Generative UI from Vercel. Chat with v0. Generate UI with simple text prompts. Copy, paste, ship.

name: Replit Agent
description: An AI agent that can build, deploy, and manage software projects within Replit's collaborative coding environment.

name: Devin
description: The first AI software engineer. Devin is an autonomous agent that can plan and execute complex engineering tasks.

name: Tabnine
description: AI assistant that speeds up delivery and keeps your code safe. Tabnine provides intelligent code completions across all major IDEs.

name: Codeium
description: Free AI-powered code completion, search, and chat for developers. Works with 70+ languages across all major IDEs.

name: Supermaven
description: The fastest copilot. Supermaven provides blazing-fast AI code completions with a 300,000 token context window.

name: Sourcegraph Cody
description: AI coding assistant that knows your entire codebase. Code smarter with autocomplete, chat, and commands.

name: Mentat
description: The AI tool that assists you with any coding task, right from your command line. Mentat coordinates edits across multiple locations and files.

name: GPT Engineer
description: Specify what you want it to build, the AI asks for clarification, and then builds it. Natural language → entire codebase.

name: Smol Developer
description: Your own junior developer. Smol developer scaffolds an entire codebase out for you with a prompt.

name: ChatGPT CLI
description: ChatGPT and GPT-4 in the command line. Store conversations, use different models, and integrate AI into your terminal workflow.
